title: Fit test - 1st screen UI
scenario: Fit Test first screen UI does not match Figma design when accessed from Device Settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a fit-test-compatible device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Fit Test.
3. Observe the Fit Test first screen UI, including all text, icons, and layout elements.
expected: The Fit Test first screen UI and text match the Figma design specifications.
